findings.summary: 5 focus stop(s) have a visible indicator that does not meet the AAA Focus Appearance bar (>= 2px-perimeter area and >= 3:1 contrast). Informative only. e.g. #field-email (contrast 3.42), #field-password (contrast 3.42), #field-confirmPassword (contrast 3.42), #field-displayName (contrast 3.42), #field-email (contrast 3.42)
findings.persona_impact: The focus indicator is present but may be hard to perceive for low-vision users.

findings.summary: 4 declared live region(s) on http://127.0.0.1:8777/form-field-vs-summary-errors.html (aria-live/status/alert/log) never produced an announcement during this session: #root > form > div:nth-of-type(1) > div, #root > form > div:nth-of-type(2) > div, #root > form > div:nth-of-type(3) > div, #root > form > div:nth-of-type(4) > div
findings.persona_impact: If this region is meant to announce dynamic updates (e.g. form errors, confirmations), a screen-reader user never hears them on this path.
